title: Goal
description: A unit of work with a defined lifecycle. Goals are submitted, not created — the system assigns identity.

id.description: System-assigned. Format: N-slug where N is a positive integer (no upper limit, no leading zeros). Never set by submitter.

status.description: Current lifecycle state. Transitions are enforced by the system.

type.description: What kind of work this is. Determines reflection requirements and spawn_eval eligibility. 'converse' is reserved for the somatic loop — it routes to the conversation handler.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. System-assigned at submission.

submitted_by.description: Identity of the submitter: 'operator' or the agent's name. Lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens, starting with a letter.

body.description: Human-readable description of the work. What to do and why.

priority.description: Dispatch priority. 1 = most urgent, 10 = someday. Lower dispatches first.

assigned_to.description: Plant name to route this goal to. Omit to let the dispatcher assign.

depends_on.description: Goal IDs that must be closed before this goal can be dispatched.

not_before.description: Do not dispatch before this UTC timestamp. Must not be earlier than submitted_at (enforced by validator).

spawn_eval.description: If true, spawn an evaluate goal when this goal reaches completed. Distinct from goal type 'evaluate'.

plant_commission.description: Optional later-plant commissioning payload for an ordinary `build` goal assigned to `gardener`.

retrospective.description: Optional retrospective payload for evaluate goals submitted through the manual retrospective protocol.

parent_goal.description: Set by system when this is an evaluate goal. ID of the goal being evaluated.

origin.description: Optional conversation linkage for durable non-'converse' goals that preserve operator-request provenance outside a live converse submission.

driver.description: Override the default execution driver for this goal.

model.description: Override the default model for this goal.

reasoning_effort.description: Optional reasoning effort override for compatible drivers.

closed_reason.description: Required when status is closed. Forbidden when status is not closed.

kind.description: Conversation linkage kind. The only accepted value is 'conversation'.

conversation_id.description: Conversation id whose operator request originated the durable work.

message_id.description: Optional source message id inside the originating conversation.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp for the originating conversation linkage.

notes.id_assignment: The id field is enforced as system-assigned by the submission validator, not by this schema. A raw JSON validator will not catch a submitter setting id.
notes.transitions: Valid transitions are documented in docs/goal/level3.md. This schema validates field shapes only, not transition sequences.
